description: Finds a child object under Instance (Slot) that matches the given arguments

fields.Instance: The slot to scan for children with.
fields.Name: The name to look for under Instance (Slot).
fields.MatchSubstring: Whether to search for children under Instance (Slot) that their name contains Name (String) instead of the entire name being equal.
fields.IgnoreCase: Whether the capitalization should matter or not when searching for a child under Instance (Slot).
fields.SearchDepth:
How far to search for a child with the provided search arguments

Examples: 0 > Search immediate children. 1 > Search children of slot including those slot's children. -1 > Search infinitely far down (HEAVY)
